description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge and several trees. The exterior features large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. A driveway leads up to the main entrance, which is accentuated by a small set of steps and a minimalist pathway. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, a wooden deck with lounge chairs, and landscaped greenery. The house is constructed primarily from concrete and glass, with some metal elements visible in the window frames and railings. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, and a backyard pool, surrounded by hedges and trees. The design features clean lines and a mix of concrete, glass, and metal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, pathway, and several trees with the pool and backyard visible to the right.
description_view_1: Backyard view highlighting the swimming pool, wooden deck with lounge chairs, and large windows facing the garden.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, hedge boundary, and the rear facade with additional windows and landscaping.
description_view_3: Alternate front view focusing on the driveway, main entry steps, and a clear view of the flat roof and window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat door, small steps, and a straight pathway, no porch or decorative columns
